title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMParkingArea
description: A vehicle parking area or facility from OpenStreetMap tagged with amenity=parking. Represents surface car parks, multi-storey garages, underground facilities, and other organised parking areas.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMParkingArea

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OpenStreetMap element. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification of the OSM element.

parkingType.description: Property. Physical type or layout of the parking facility. Enum:'surface, multi-storey, underground, street_side, rooftop, sheds, carports, garage_boxes, lane'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Tag:amenity%3Dparking'

access.description: Property. Access restriction for the parking facility. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:access'

capacity.description: Property. Total number of parking spaces available. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:capacity'

fee.description: Property. Indicates whether a fee is charged for parking. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:fee'

operator.description: Property. Name of the entity operating or managing the parking facility. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:operator'

maxStay.description: Property. Maximum permitted parking duration (e.g. '2h', '1 day'). Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:maxstay'

surface.description: Property. Surface material of the parking area. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:surface'

lit.description: Property. Indicates whether the parking area is lit at night. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:lit'

wheelchair.description: Property. Availability of wheelchair-accessible parking spaces. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wheelchair'

capacityDisabled.description: Property. Number of designated disabled parking spaces. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:capacity:disabled'

openingHours.description: Property. Opening hours of the parking facility in OSM opening_hours syntax. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:opening_hours'

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources about this item.
